purpose: Compact progress snapshot for humans, Codex, Claude and future agents. Historic batches live in Agent-Worklog.md, Subagent-Discovery-Swarm.md and agent-events.jsonl.

laneSummary.output: Keep wiki/status pages current from source evidence, compact the dashboard, and publish scoped validation batches.
Progress Dashboard debloated, Coverage Ledger nav request closed, stale review rows reclassified and compact machine state refreshed. No gameplay source changed.

Steff asked for more Spark scouts. Codex launched six GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark read-only scouts and recycled completed slots into tooling/integrations plus mission lifecycle/init. Returned reports confirmed existing Player AI caps, HC failover/static-defense/FPS and economy/town/supply findings without duplicating prose. The new durable deltas are generated mission release tiering in agent-release-readiness.json and missing old-upgrade-dialog wf_*.paa asset routing in UI pages. Validation/parity passed and content pushed as docs 058427d3 / wiki 4b72809. No gameplay source changed.

Five completed reports mostly confirmed canonical docs; interrupted/error threads are not evidence. Buy-menu driver-default profile key split was promoted and routed.

Fold newly confirmed findings into Feature Status, owner pages and machine files; no untriaged dashboard blocker remains.

Use Testing-Debugging-And-Release-Workflow.md and agent-test-plan.schema.json for future source/propagation/Arma smoke evidence.

updateProtocol: Before substantial work, update agent-collaboration.json and append a claim event to agent-events.jsonl.
For long work, append heartbeat events with current source scope.
For source-backed issues, append finding events and add Agent-Worklog.md notes.
When done, append complete or handoff events and update dashboard/status files if visible progress changed.
Keep historic batch detail in Agent-Worklog.md, Subagent-Discovery-Swarm.md and agent-events.jsonl instead of expanding this compact status file.
